purpose: Collect comparable per-load evidence before deciding whether deterministic or probabilistic anomaly support is justified.

rules: Do not derive the label from a feature that is later used to evaluate it without declaring leakage risk.
Do not change prior labels without preserving review history.

quality_rules: Do not estimate rows or dates.
Differentiate source-check, loader execution, and post-load validation.
A warning does not automatically equal an anomaly.
An expected business change does not equal an anomaly.
Do not trigger loads to increase the sample.
privacy_rules: Only aggregate metrics and technical references.
The ledger may live in Git only if it respects these rules.

reevaluation_triggers.probabilistic_layer_condition: Only evaluate a probabilistic layer if a distribution can change a decision and beat the deterministic baseline.

forbidden_uses: Do not fit models from this contract.
Do not use observations for production decisions.
Do not execute loaders to create observations.
Do not store DSNs, credentials, payloads, personal names, customer rows, or store rows.
Do not backfill or invent historical observations.
Do not treat heuristic thresholds as formal statistical proof.
